response: People with braces cannot manipulate gravity at will because the presence of braces is purely a mechanical and orthodontic intervention designed to correct dental and jaw alignment. It has no effect on gravitational forces, which are governed by the mass of objects and the laws of physics, not by dental appliances. The idea of manipulating gravity at will is currently beyond the realm of human capability and remains a concept of science fiction. The limitations of human physiology, including those affected by braces, do not extend to altering fundamental physical forces. weakness.
